title: Black Panther Wakanda Forever
writer: Ryan Coogler and Joe Robert Cole
logline: After T'Challa's death, Shuri and Queen Ramonda must protect Wakanda from Namor, the ruler of the underwater kingdom of Talocan, who emerges to threaten the surface world when his people are endangered by vibranium mining operations.
antagonistOrConflict: Namor and the threat to both Wakanda and Talocan
tone: Epic, emotional, with themes of grief, legacy, and responsibility

actBreaks.description: Shuri and Riri are captured by Namor's forces after the Cambridge chase, launching the main conflict.

validation.ruling: Scene #103 where Okoye regains consciousness and sees Attuma and Namora fleeing with Shuri and Riri into the depths perfectly ends Act 1 - it's an irreversible plot twist that fundamentally changes the story direction from protection mission to rescue mission, forcing Wakanda into higher-stakes conflict with an unknown enemy.

actBreaks.description: Ramonda dies saving Riri, fundamentally shifting Shuri's emotional journey and the stakes of the conflict.

validation.ruling: Scene #235 where Shuri walks toward the river with a weight, contemplating suicide while confronting Nakia and Okoye, represents the ultimate low point and character crisis that ends Act 2 - it's a major thematic shift where Shuri must choose between death and embracing her destiny as the Black Panther.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This is a grief-driven superhero epic that uses a traditional three-act structure but subverts expectations by making the emotional journey as important as the action. The first act establishes the world post-T'Challa and introduces the vibranium mining threat. The second act is dominated by Namor's introduction and the complex diplomatic dance between Wakanda and Talocan, with Shuri's capture serving as the catalyst. The third act becomes deeply personal after Ramonda's sacrifice, transforming from political conflict to emotional reckoning. The structure cleverly balances intimate character moments with large-scale action sequences.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The pacing is deliberately measured in the opening, taking time to establish grief and world-building before the vibranium mining attack (scene 14) accelerates the plot. The Cambridge chase sequence (scenes 66-103) provides a major action beat that transitions into the more contemplative middle section exploring Talocan culture. The final act accelerates dramatically after Ramonda's death, building to the climactic battle.

incitingIncident.description: Okoye climbs out injured and finds both Shuri and Riri unconscious, then Talocanil warriors led by Namora and Attuma arrive on whales and orcas to confront her.

validation.ruling: Scene #14 is merely setup showing a cargo ship with mining equipment. Scene #102 is the true inciting incident where Talocanil warriors led by Namora and Attuma arrive on whales and orcas to confront Okoye, then abduct Shuri and Riri - this shatters the status quo, forces Wakanda into irreversible conflict with Talocan, and establishes the main story stakes.

midpoint.description: Ramonda meets Namor on a beach and confirms she has destroyed the detector plans, asking for Shuri's return while Namor questions her truthfulness.
midpoint.sceneHeading: EXT. BEACH - NOSY NATO - MADAGASCAR - DAY

validation.ruling: Scene #156 shows negotiation but no character transformation. Scene #158 is the true midpoint where Nakia infiltrates the cave and shoots both Talocanil guards to save Shuri and Riri - this is the point of no return that shifts the story from diplomatic solutions to open warfare, forcing all parties into proactive conflict.

climax.description: Shuri positions herself between Namor and water, activates the thrusters engulfing them both in flames, then holds a spear to the barely alive Namor's throat.

validation.ruling: Scene #320 shows Shuri pursuing the weakened Namor but is setup for the confrontation. Scene #321 is the true climax where Shuri positions herself between Namor and water, activates thrusters engulfing them both in flames, then holds a spear to the barely alive Namor's throat - this is the peak confrontation that resolves the main conflict through direct action.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI’S LAB - WDG - 2025 (ONE YEAR AFTER ENDGAME)
scenes.summary: Shuri storms into her lab with frantic urgency, working with scientists on DNA models as someone's heart rate drops fast and a double helix turns from green to red.

scenes.heading: EXT. SACRED GROVE - WAKANDA - DAY
scenes.summary: At T'Challa's funeral in the Sacred Grove, Sope the Shaman pours libations over soil while Shuri stands next to Queen Ramonda and tribal leaders look down at the black casket.
scenes.turningPointNote: T'Challa's death establishes the central loss driving the story

scenes.heading: EXT. NORTH TRIANGLE - GOLDEN CITY - WAKANDA - DAY
scenes.summary: A funeral procession of drumming, dancing Wakandans follows Ramonda, Shuri, and the Dora carrying T'Challa's casket, shield, and helmet toward Bashenga Triangle.

scenes.heading: EXT. BASHENGA TRIANGLE - NORTH TRIANGLE - WAKANDA - DAY
scenes.summary: The Dora set T'Challa's casket in front of Bashenga's hut where Zawavari performs a prayer in Xhosa to honor the king who united the five tribes.

scenes.heading: EXT. GENEVA, SWITZERLAND - SKYLINE - DAY - ONE YEAR LATER
scenes.summary: One year later, the Royal Talon Fighter soars over Lake Geneva toward the United Nations as the Chairperson speaks about maintaining international peace and security.

scenes.heading: INT. HEARING ROOM - UNITED NATIONS - GENEVA - DAY
scenes.summary: In a packed UN hearing room, the Chairperson invites Queen Ramonda to speak while UN ushers note she didn't bring her normal security detail.

scenes.heading: EXT. MALI OUTREACH CENTER - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Paratroopers descend from the night sky toward a futuristic Mali Outreach Center extending over a river.

scenes.heading: INT. MALI OUTREACH CENTER - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Eight armed mercenaries blow open the doors of the Mali Outreach Center and order the Mali scientists and WDG technicians to get down on their stomachs.

scenes.heading: INT. HEARING ROOM - UNITED NATIONS - GENEVA - DAY
scenes.summary: At the UN hearing, the US Secretary of State criticizes Wakanda's failure to deliver on T'Challa's promises regarding vibranium sharing and international cooperation.

scenes.heading: INT. SAND FILTER TREATMENT FLOOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: A mercenary forces a female Mali tech at gunpoint to show him where the vibranium tools are stored and roughly pushes her toward the vault.

scenes.heading: INT. UNITED NATIONS - GENEVA, SWITZERLAND - DAY
scenes.summary: The French Secretary of State questions Wakanda's secrecy around vibranium and asks why help is only extended to certain groups of people.

scenes.heading: INT. SAND FILTER TREATMENT FLOOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The female Mali tech opens the vault and removes her scarf, revealing herself as Aneka of the Dora Milaje, while Okoye and other Dora emerge from the darkness to attack the mercenaries.
scenes.turningPointNote: The reveal of the Dora trap and counterattack shifts the power dynamic

scenes.heading: INT. UNITED NATIONS - GENEVA, SWITZERLAND - DAY
scenes.summary: Ramonda reveals another attack on their outreach facilities and presents evidence as the Dora escort the captured mercenaries into the UN chamber.

scenes.heading: EXT. ATLANTIC OCEAN - DAY
scenes.summary: A cargo ship travels in the Atlantic Ocean with an enormous underwater mining vehicle on deck and a data umbilical cord extending into the water.
scenes.turningPointNote: Introduction of the vibranium mining operation that will trigger the conflict with Talocan

scenes.heading: EXT. DEEP OCEAN - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: A large vibranium detector on treads rolls along the ocean floor connected to the umbilical cord until an indicator light changes colors.

scenes.heading: INT. CONTROL ROOM - CARGO SHIP - DAY
scenes.summary: In the ship's control room, CIA agent Smitty and mining technicians monitor readings when a display suddenly chirps, prompting Smitty to radio for the ship to stop.

scenes.heading: EXT. HELICOPTER PAD - CARGO SHIP - NIGHT
scenes.summary: On the helicopter pad, CIA Dr. Graham arrives by chopper and discusses with Smitty how the machine had less than a one in a billion chance of finding vibranium.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - CARGO SHIP - NIGHT - LATER
scenes.summary: A crane removes the moon pool cover as military guards watch divers Salazar and Jackson get strapped into atmospheric diving suits and lowered into the ocean.

scenes.heading: INT. ATLANTIC OCEAN - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Salazar and Jackson descend through the Atlantic depths toward the ocean floor where an underwater mining vehicle and vibranium detector await near hydrothermal vents.

scenes.heading: INT. CONTROL ROOM - CARGO SHIP - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Dr. Graham monitors the divers through body-mounted cameras and ocean bed footage while Smitty watches over her shoulder as she guides them to their target.

scenes.heading: INT. OCEAN FLOOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Salazar and Jackson discover the mining rig's metal digging mechanism is completely destroyed and bent back like scrap metal, with a small vein of metal visible in the trench.

scenes.heading: INT. CONTROL ROOM - CARGO SHIP - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Dr. Graham reacts with excitement to the vibranium discovery while Smitty beams, and she orders them to retrieve the detector since it's the only one they have.

scenes.heading: INT. OCEAN FLOOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: As Salazar moves back toward the submersible, the mining lights suddenly go out one after another, plunging the ocean floor into darkness.

scenes.heading: INT. CONTROL ROOM - CARGO SHIP - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Dr. Graham loses visual on the monitors as the underwater camera feeds go dark, while Salazar reports that all the lights went out.

scenes.heading: INT. OCEAN FLOOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Using their suit-mounted lights, Salazar spots a bioluminescent animal floating toward them rhythmically in the distance and asks Jackson if he sees it.

scenes.heading: INT. CONTROL ROOM - CARGO SHIP - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Dr. Graham notices Salazar's heart rate slowly rising on the vitals display and asks what she's seeing.

scenes.heading: EXT. BOAT DECK - NIGHT
scenes.summary: A military man on the boat deck notices a blue-skinned woman treading water with her eyes trained on the boat.

scenes.heading: INT. OCEAN FLOOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Salazar focuses on the approaching squid when Jackson is suddenly snatched into the darkness by an unseen figure, leaving only his severed umbilical behind.
scenes.turningPointNote: First direct attack by Talocan forces, escalating the threat

scenes.heading: INT. CONTROL ROOM - CARGO SHIP - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Dr. Graham and Smitty watch the monitors with growing dread as she asks what Salazar means by Jackson being gone.

scenes.heading: INT. OCEAN FLOOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Salazar stares in horror at Jackson's severed umbilical as the expanding squid comes within arm's reach, then screams before being cut off.

scenes.heading: INT. CONTROL ROOM - CARGO SHIP - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Salazar's vitals flatline as Dr. Graham and Smitty stare at the screen in shock, then receive a radio report of a situation on deck.

scenes.heading: EXT. BOAT DECK - CARGO SHIP - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Military men gather at the deck edge and peer over to see something in the waves below.

scenes.heading: EXT. OCEAN’S SURFACE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Ten Talocanil women and men float on the ocean's surface staring at the ship, some singing guttural whale-like sounds while others play ocarinas.

scenes.heading: EXT. BOAT DECK - CARGO SHIP - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The military men become transfixed by the haunting sound, their facial muscles going slack as they walk toward the edge and jump off the boat.

scenes.heading: INT. CONTROL ROOM - CARGO SHIP - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Smitty and Dr. Graham hear the singing, unholster their pistols, and watch on surveillance as soldiers leap into the ocean before heading out with earplugs.

scenes.heading: INT. HELICOPTER - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The helicopter pilot receives a radio message, starts the helicopter, and unholsters and cocks his pistol.

scenes.heading: INT. CONTROL ROOM - CARGO SHIP - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Dr. Graham produces earplugs as they watch more men jumping off on surveillance, then both cock their pistols and head out onto the deck.

scenes.heading: EXT. BOAT DECK - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Smitty and Dr. Graham crouch-walk toward a ladder leading to the helicopter deck with the singing muffled by their earplugs.

scenes.heading: EXT. UPPER BOAT DECK - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Smitty fires his pistol into the air to snap the lead mining technician out of his trance as he prepares to jump off the edge.

scenes.heading: EXT. OCEAN’S SURFACE - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The sirens stop singing at the gunshot and vanish underwater as fast swimmers pass by them, headed toward the surface.

scenes.heading: EXT. UPPER BOAT DECK - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: As the singing stops, the confused mining technician is suddenly yanked off the boat, then Smitty is impaled by a spear as Attuma pulls himself onto the deck.
scenes.turningPointNote: Attuma's arrival marks the full-scale Talocanil assault on the ship

scenes.heading: EXT. CATWALK - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Dr. Graham runs for her life, ducking under scaffolding and running up stairs to escape the attack.

scenes.heading: EXT. HELICOPTER PAD - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Dr. Graham sprints toward the helicopter as Talocanil warriors close in from both sides, exchanging gunfire before slamming the door as a warrior punches the window.

scenes.heading: INT. HELICOPTER - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Graham unloads her clip into the Talocanil warrior forcing him to let go as the helicopter pilot frantically guides the aircraft up.

scenes.heading: EXT. BOAT DECK - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The helicopter rises, causing the second Talocanil warrior to fall off the aircraft.

scenes.heading: EXT. OCEAN'S SURFACE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The sirens breach the ocean surface again and start singing a new melody.

scenes.heading: EXT. HELICOPTER PAD - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The Talocanil watch the helicopter grow smaller, then part ways and kneel as human feet with winged ankles land on the boat, revealing Namor's muscular back.
scenes.turningPointNote: Namor's first appearance establishes him as the primary antagonist

scenes.heading: INT. HELICOPTER - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Dr. Graham calls for a strike team on her sat phone, reporting everyone's death, when the helicopter suddenly jerks and stops moving despite still hovering.

scenes.heading: EXT. NIGHT SKY - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The helicopter is frozen in midair with Namor holding the stabilizer.

scenes.heading: INT. HELICOPTER - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The helicopter pilot tries to accelerate but nothing happens as Dr. Graham realizes their situation, then an alert sounds as the chopper begins descending.

scenes.heading: EXT. NIGHT SKY - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: A helicopter hurtles toward the ocean's surface.

scenes.heading: EXT. OCEAN'S SURFACE - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The helicopter is engulfed by waves, explodes, and gradually sinks into the ocean.

scenes.heading: INT. RTF - MORNING
scenes.summary: Ramonda sits in the RTF listening to a newscaster discuss her UN speech about mercenaries stealing vibranium and evidence against the French government.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI’S LAB - WAKANDAN DESIGN GROUP - AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Shuri works on battle suit projections in her lab when Ramonda arrives, leading to a conversation about AI and unknown threats on the horizon.

scenes.heading: EXT. WAKANDA - DUSK - SERIES OF SHOTS
scenes.summary: Shuri pilots her hovercraft with Ramonda toward the Wakandan Bush, passing through various landscapes.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVERBANK - WAKANDAN BUSH - NIGHT - HOURS LATER
scenes.summary: At a riverbank campsite, Ramonda discusses River Tribe rituals while Shuri dismisses them and expresses anger about Nakia missing T'Challa's funeral, before elephants emerge from the bush.

scenes.heading: INT. TRIBAL COUNCIL ROOM - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: M'Baku enters the Tribal Council room offering Jabari support while naval officers report a river border breach by a mysterious figure.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI’S LAB - WAKANDAN DESIGN GROUP - DAY - LATER
scenes.summary: Shuri examines the vibranium detector in pieces while discussing its brilliant construction and the possibility of vibranium existing outside Wakanda with Ramonda and Okoye.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROSS' HOUSE - VIRGINIA - EARLY MORNING
scenes.summary: Everett Ross exits his house in running gear and begins to jog.

scenes.heading: EXT. VIRGINIA WOODS - EARLY MORNING
scenes.summary: Ross runs through woods, notices a flying bug that turns out to be a Kimoyo Bead Drone, and follows it when summoned.

scenes.heading: EXT. CLEARING - VIRGINIA WOODS - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Ross meets Okoye and Shuri in a clearing where they reveal they're looking for the vibranium detector scientist and Ross tells them about a joint operation where 40 people were killed.
scenes.turningPointNote: Major revelation about casualties and the connection between the vibranium detector and deadly attacks

scenes.heading: EXT. DOWNTOWN BOSTON, MA - SKYLINE - DAY
scenes.summary: Establishing shot of downtown Boston and Cambridge, home to Harvard and MIT.

scenes.heading: EXT. MIT CAMPUS - DAY
scenes.summary: Riri Williams demands payment from an MIT student for correcting his robotic hand algorithm while Okoye and Shuri watch from nearby.

scenes.heading: INT. HALLWAY - MIT HOUSING - DAY - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Shuri knocks on Riri's door and mentions an encrypted file, causing Riri to recognize the Princess of Wakanda.

scenes.heading: INT. RIRI’S STUDIO APARTMENT - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Shuri tells Riri she's in danger because of the vibranium detector she built as a school project, and that she needs to come with them for safety.
scenes.turningPointNote: Riri is identified as the target and told she's in immediate danger

scenes.heading: EXT. RIRI’S GARAGE - OFF CAMPUS - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Riri uses complex security codes to open her garage while Okoye watches in confusion.

scenes.heading: INT. RIRI’S GARAGE - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: In Riri's garage lab, Griot warns that law enforcement is approaching while Shuri examines blueprints and Riri protects her encrypted laptop.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIRI’S GARAGE - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: A Kimoyo Bead rolls under an armored police car and attaches itself to the vehicle's underside.

scenes.heading: INT. RIRI’S GARAGE - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Surrounded by police, the trio prepares to escape using Riri's vehicles - she reveals a flying suit hanging from the ceiling while Okoye eyes a car.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIRI’S GARAGE - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Officers react to Riri taking flight while an FBI helicopter pilot pursues her.

scenes.heading: I/E. RIRI’S BARRACUDA - RIRI’S GARAGE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Okoye starts the Barracuda as Shuri jumps out and activates Griot to control the armored police car.

scenes.heading: I/E. ARMORED CAR - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The hacked armored car reverses and crashes into other police cars behind it.

scenes.heading: I/E. RIRI'S BARRACUDA - NIGHT - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: The Barracuda crashes through the garage door and speeds into the driveway.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIRI’S GARAGE - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Chaos erupts as the armored vehicle clears a path for the Barracuda while bullets shatter the car's back windshield.

scenes.heading: INT. RIRI’S GARAGE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Shuri puts on Riri's helmet and gloves, jumps on the dirt bike, and guns the engine.

scenes.heading: EXT. REAR - RIRI'S GARAGE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Shuri blasts out the back door on the motorcycle, evades police cars through a warehouse, and uses Griot Vision to jump a fence on a narrow escape route.

scenes.heading: EXT. CAMBRIDGE SKY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Riri regains control in the sky, spots the pursuing helicopter, and rockets off.

scenes.heading: EXT. CAMBRIDGE STREETS - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Shuri takes corners quickly on the motorcycle and sees the FBI helicopter pursuing Riri above.

scenes.heading: EXT. CAMBRIDGE SKY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Riri flies toward the street and tells Shuri she'll handle the helicopter pursuit.

scenes.heading: EXT. CAMBRIDGE STREET - NIGHT
scenes.summary: A police car forces Shuri to drive up church steps where she pops a wheelie, while Riri warns her to take care of the bike.

scenes.heading: EXT. CAMBRIDGE SKY - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Riri speeds through the air toward the helicopter while warning Shuri not to crash.

scenes.heading: EXT. CAMBRIDGE STREETS - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Shuri drives between church columns and squeezes between two police cars as they crash into each other.

scenes.heading: I/E. RIRI'S BARRACUDA - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Okoye threatens Griot with violence unless he takes her to Shuri, causing the Barracuda's engine to roar.

scenes.heading: I/E. FBI HELICOPTER - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The FBI helicopter pilot engages Riri in a dogfight where her evasive flying causes a gunner to fall and dangle, leading to the helicopter's tail-rotor being destroyed and crashing into the river.

scenes.heading: I/E. RIRI’S BARRACUDA - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Frustrated with Griot's control, Okoye uses her spear to deactivate Shuri's Kimoyo Bead and takes control of the Barracuda.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIRI’S MOTORCYCLE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Using her computerized contact lenses, Shuri sees the armored car and Barracuda exiting a tunnel while police pursue her on the motorcycle.

scenes.heading: I/E. RIRI'S BARRACUDA - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Shuri lands on top of the moving armored car with magnetic shoes as Griot spins it 180 degrees to take out three police cars, allowing her to communicate with Okoye through the window.

scenes.heading: INT. DRONE FLYING FACILITY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: A drone operator locks both Shuri's motorcycle and Okoye's Barracuda into his surveillance screen.

scenes.heading: EXT. CAMBRIDGE SKY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Riri launches herself straight up toward high altitude to reach a surveillance drone, despite Shuri's concerns about the theoretical limits of her suit.

scenes.heading: EXT. CAMBRIDGE SKY - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Riri's suit begins to rattle as she corkscrews upward toward the drone.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIRI'S MOTORCYCLE - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Shuri spots FBI vehicles ahead while warning Riri that the drone is too high to reach without an oxygen mask.

scenes.heading: EXT. NIGHT SKY - HIGH ABOVE CAMBRIDGE - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Pushing her suit's limits, Riri climbs higher, passes out from lack of oxygen, fires a repulsor blast at the drone, then plummets toward the ocean.

scenes.heading: INT. DRONE FLYING FACILITY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The drone operator sees the incoming blast and pulls his controls up in response.

scenes.heading: EXT. NIGHT SKY - ABOVE CAMBRIDGE
scenes.summary: The surveillance drone explodes on contact with Riri's repulsor blast.

scenes.heading: INT. DRONE FLYING FACILITY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The drone operator loses his screen image and reports being hit with lost visuals.

scenes.heading: EXT. CAMBRIDGE STREETS - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Griot confirms the drone is no longer tracking them while Shuri sees Riri plunging from the sky in her Griot-Vision.

scenes.heading: EXT. NIGHT SKY - HIGH ABOVE CAMBRIDGE - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Riri snaps conscious just before impact, ignites her thrusters, and levels off to fly parallel to the river toward Harvard Bridge.

scenes.heading: EXT. CAMBRIDGE STREET - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Shuri and Okoye approach the bridge when a three-car police blockade appears in front of them.

scenes.heading: I/E. RIRI'S BARRACUDA - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The surveillance aircraft that Riri shot down crashes from the sky, wiping out the police blockade and clearing a debris-filled path for Shuri and Okoye to escape through.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - HARVARD BRIDGE - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Riri celebrates their success while flying over Harvard Bridge when she is suddenly impaled by a harpoon and yanked to the ground by an unseen force, her laptop dislodged on impact.
scenes.turningPointNote: Major shocking attack on Riri by mysterious enemy just as escape seemed successful

scenes.heading: I/E. RIRI'S BARRACUDA - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: A massive water explosion causes both vehicles to wreck, with Shuri's bike colliding with the Barracuda and Shuri flying to the asphalt while the car flips and bursts into flames.

scenes.heading: I/E. RIRI'S BARRACUDA - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Okoye climbs out injured and finds both Shuri and Riri unconscious, then Talocanil warriors led by Namora and Attuma arrive on whales and orcas to confront her.
scenes.turningPointNote: First appearance of Talocanil forces - the underwater threat is revealed

scenes.heading: EXT. CHARLES RIVER - NIGHT - A MOMENT LATER
scenes.summary: Okoye regains consciousness to see Attuma and Namora fleeing with Shuri and Riri into the water depths and screams.

scenes.heading: EXT. HARVARD BRIDGE - MORNING
scenes.summary: Ross investigates the crime scene with FBI agents and learns that Val called in advance claiming Wakandans were responsible, then Val arrives in person.

scenes.heading: INT. TRIBAL COUNCIL ROOM - MORNING
scenes.summary: Okoye reports to the Tribal Council about the blue superhuman attackers with vibranium weapons who came from the water, and the elders discuss terminating her for failing to protect Shuri.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI'S LAB - WDG - DAY - LATER
scenes.summary: Ramonda enters Shuri's lab and learns from Griot that Shuri wasn't abducted but voluntarily asked to be taken to Namor.

scenes.heading: EXT. PARKING LOT - BUSH CENTER OF INTELLIGENCE - DAY
scenes.summary: Ross pulls his rental car into Val's parking spot.

scenes.heading: INT. ROSS’ RENTAL CAR - DAY
scenes.summary: Ross and Val discuss the Cambridge incident in his car when Shuri's kimoyo beads ring in Ross's pocket.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI'S LAB - WDG - DAY
scenes.summary: Ramonda speaks with Ross via hologram, learning that both Shuri and Riri were taken by unknown attackers while trying to save the student.

scenes.heading: EXT. BEACH - NOSY NATO - MADAGASCAR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Ramonda removes her crown, blows the conch shell Namor gave her, and throws it into the ocean from a beach in Madagascar.

scenes.heading: EXT. BEACH - NOSY NATO - MADAGASCAR - NIGHT - HOURS LATER
scenes.summary: Namor emerges from the ocean to meet Ramonda, who demands her daughter's return and threatens to expose Talocan's existence to the Americans if he refuses.

scenes.heading: INT. ROYAL TALON FIGHTER - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Ramonda boards the Royal Talon Fighter and asks Griot to locate Nakia, learning that Shuri forbade data collection on her.

scenes.heading: EXT. PORT DU PRINCE - HAITI - DAY
scenes.summary: Ships dock at the bustling downtown airport in Port du Prince, Haiti.

scenes.heading: EXT. COURTYARD - HAITIAN SCHOOL - DAY
scenes.summary: Disguised Ramonda observes Haitian children playing soccer and is approached by a boy who offers to lead her to the head mistress.

scenes.heading: INT. SECOND FLOOR HALLWAY - HAITIAN SCHOOL - DAY - MOMENTS
scenes.summary: The children lead Ramonda to Nakia, who is helping students with a sustainable garden, and Nakia freezes upon seeing her.

scenes.heading: EXT. GARDEN - HAITIAN SCHOOL - DAY - LATER
scenes.summary: Nakia tours Ramonda through the garden they've built using local materials, and they discuss T'Challa's funeral and Nakia's absence from it.

scenes.heading: EXT. LANDING PAD - ROYAL PALACE - THE GOLDEN CITY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Okoye approaches a Talon Fighter but is blocked by Ayo and surrounded by Dora Milaje and Kingsguard who prevent her from leaving to search for Shuri.

scenes.heading: EXT. FELIPE CARRILLO PUERTO - YUCATÁN PENINSULA - MORNING
scenes.summary: A Mayan Elder approaches her home and encounters Nakia disguised as a student researcher asking about someone she encountered.

scenes.heading: INT. ELDER’S HOME - YUCATÁN PENINSULA - A BIT LATER
scenes.summary: The Mayan Elder serves Nakia cocoa and demands the truth about who she really is in exchange for the information she seeks.

scenes.heading: INT. VISITOR'S QUARTERS - CAVE SYSTEM - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri awakens in a cave decorated with Mayan artifacts and kelp furnishings, finds Riri unconscious, and tries to calm her panic attack upon waking.

scenes.heading: INT. DRY TUNNEL - CAVE SYSTEM - DAY - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Namora leads Shuri, now dressed in a stunning dress, through a dry tunnel toward an opening.

scenes.heading: INT. NAMOR’S CAVERN - CAVE SYSTEM - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Shuri and Namora emerge into a giant cave with a large pool and stone stairs leading to a hut.

scenes.heading: INT. NAMOR’S MEMOROBILIA HUT - CAVE SYSTEM - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Namora brings Shuri into Namor's hut where he waits wearing an elaborate headpiece, promising her safety while she observes Mayan artifacts and a blueish plant.

scenes.heading: EXT. TULUM OUTSKIRTS - DAY - 1571 AD (NAMOR FLASHBACK)
scenes.summary: In 1571 AD, a pregnant woman finds a jade stone on the beach near her Mayan village that is hiding from Spanish conquistadors and suffering from smallpox.

scenes.heading: EXT. CENOTE ENTRANCE - YUCATAN - DAY - 1571 AD
scenes.summary: The Shaman dives into the cenote entrance at the snake mouth cave.

scenes.heading: EXT. CENOTE ENTRANCE - YUCATAN- DAY - 1571 AD
scenes.summary: The Shaman emerges from the cenote holding the blueish Weber Azul plant.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUTH OF CENOTE - DAY - 1571 AD
scenes.summary: The Shaman mixes the plant into a blue potion and distributes it to the tribe while Namor's mother argues about drinking it while pregnant.

scenes.heading: EXT. TULUM OUTSKIRTS - DAY - 1571 AD
scenes.summary: The elders convince Namor's mother to drink the potion by pointing to her smallpox lesions, and the entire tribe drinks and falls unconscious.

scenes.heading: EXT. BEACH - TULUM - SUNSET - 1571 AD
scenes.summary: Namor's mother and the tribe awaken with gills and blue skin, gasping for air until they run into the surf where they can breathe underwater.
scenes.turningPointNote: The origin of the Talocanil people - transformation from land to sea dwellers

scenes.heading: INT. BEACH - YUCATAN - DAY - 1631 AD
scenes.summary: Young Namor emerges from the water in 1631 AD with Talocanil soldiers carrying his mother's seaweed-wrapped body for burial.

scenes.heading: EXT. HACIENDA - YUCUTAN - DAY - 1631 AD
scenes.summary: Young Namor discovers a hacienda where Indigenous people labor as slaves under Spanish overseers, horrifying him as Talocanil soldiers emerge and the Spanish reach for weapons.

scenes.heading: EXT. HACIENDA - YUCATAN - DAY - 1631 AD
scenes.summary: The hacienda burns with dead slavers while Indigenous people run free, and Namor buries his mother before killing a dying Friar who curses him.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - YUCATAN - DAY - 1631 AD
scenes.summary: Young Namor flies up and sees the Yucatan carved into multiple haciendas, realization creeping over his face.

scenes.heading: EXT. HACIENDA - YUCATAN - DAY - 1631 AD
scenes.summary: Namor and his soldiers leave the hacienda and head back toward the ocean as he becomes king of the growing Talocan.

scenes.heading: INT. NAMOR’S MEMOROBILIA HUT - CAVE SYSTEM - DAY - PRESENT DAY
scenes.summary: Back in the present, Namor finishes showing Shuri paintings of his story and explains why he must kill the scientist to protect his vulnerable people from colonizers seeking their metal.

scenes.heading: INT. NAMOR’S CAVERN - CAVE SYSTEM - DAY - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Namor and Shuri stand at the shoreline where she puts on Salazar's atmospheric diving suit and they descend into the water together.

scenes.heading: EXT. DEEP OCEAN - DAY - LATER
scenes.summary: Namor and Shuri swim through darkness in the deep ocean.

scenes.heading: EXT. TOWN SQUARE - TALOCAN - DEEP OCEAN - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Shuri sees the illuminated city of Talocan with its brown-skinned residents, underwater gardens, and Mayan pyramid structure, marveling at their ability to grow corn underwater.
scenes.turningPointNote: Shuri witnesses Talocan - the hidden underwater civilization is fully revealed

scenes.heading: EXT. PARKING LOT - MORNING
scenes.summary: Ross uses a chloroform rag to subdue a man in a parking lot, taking his identity for infiltration.

scenes.heading: INT. LOBBY - NSA FACILITY - MORNING
scenes.summary: Ross enters the NSA facility in disguise while Ramonda guides him via earpiece to get Shuri's kimoyo beads within range of a laptop.

scenes.heading: INT. MACHINE ROOM - NSA FACILITY - MORNING
scenes.summary: Ross enters the machine room with an NSA liaison, maneuvers around security cameras, and plants a thumb drive while searching for Riri's laptop.

scenes.heading: INT. LOBBY - NSA FACILITY - MORNING
scenes.summary: The NSA liaison leads Ross back to the lobby and they flirt while Ramonda notes the laptop remains a problem.

scenes.heading: INT. RESTROOM - NSA FACILITY - MORNING
scenes.summary: Ross flushes Shuri's kimoyo beads down a toilet to amplify the signal through steel pipes, successfully interfacing with the laptop system.

scenes.heading: INT. VISITOR'S QUARTERS - TALOCAN - MORNING
scenes.summary: Shuri tries to convince a dubious Riri to help with an escape plan while secretly building a kimoyo bead amplifier from stolen vibranium.

scenes.heading: INT. VISITOR'S QUARTERS - CAVE SYSTEM - DAY - LATER
scenes.summary: Shuri and Riri work on the fiber optic light amplifier under Namora's watch while Shuri covertly steals vibranium and builds a hidden kimoyo bead amplifier.

scenes.heading: EXT. BEACH - TULUM - YUCATAN - DUSK
scenes.summary: Nakia stands on a beach in Tulum with a Skirmisher vehicle when her kimoyo bead chirps and she looks toward the cliff.

scenes.heading: EXT. CENOTE ENTRANCE - YUCATAN - DUSK
scenes.summary: Nakia approaches the cenote entrance from Namor's flashback, sends her Skirmisher vehicle into the water, and gets permission from Ramonda to retrieve Shuri.

scenes.heading: INT. ROYAL TALON FIGHTER - SKY
scenes.summary: Ramonda considers Nakia's request and gives permission to retrieve Shuri by any means necessary while she attempts to draw Namor out.

scenes.heading: INT. WATER - CENOTE - DUSK
scenes.summary: Nakia swims through the cenote in her Wakandan diving suit and is speed-boosted away by a massive current in her Skirmisher vehicle.

scenes.heading: INT. VISITOR’S QUARTERS - CAVE SYSTEM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Namor observes as Shuri approaches with the completed fiber optic light amplifier while Riri hides the other devices they've built.

scenes.heading: EXT. NAMOR’S TEMPLE - TALOCAN - LATER
scenes.summary: Namor and Namora lead Shuri and Riri in diving suits toward the temple while Riri notices fiber optic cables and deduces how Talocan found her by hacking into them.

scenes.heading: INT. NAMOR’S TEMPLE - TALOCAN - DAY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Shuri connects her fiber optic light amplifier to the sastun under Namor's observation, then swims to him as they prepare to watch it rise.

scenes.heading: EXT. TALOCAN - MORNING
scenes.summary: Shuri's enhanced sastun rises from the temple roof emitting brilliant light as Talocanil civilians emerge to witness it, with Namor deeply moved by the sight.

scenes.heading: EXT. TALOCANIL GARDENS - TALOCAN - DAY
scenes.summary: Namor and Shuri swim through vast underwater gardens of kelp, seaweed, and maize as she marvels at the agricultural achievement.

scenes.heading: INT. NAMOR'S MEMOROBILIA ROOM - CAVE SYSTEM - DAY
scenes.summary: Namor gives Shuri a bracelet as gratitude, but she refuses to stand by while he kills Riri and argues for finding a peaceful way forward together.

scenes.heading: EXT. BEACH - NOSY NATO - MADAGASCAR - DAY
scenes.summary: Ramonda meets Namor on a beach and confirms she has destroyed the detector plans, asking for Shuri's return while Namor questions her truthfulness.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ramonda's deal with Namor sets up the betrayal that will trigger his retaliation

scenes.heading: INT. VISITOR'S QUARTERS - CAVE SYSTEM - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri tells Riri that Namor wants her help for war against the surface world, but their conversation is interrupted when two Talocanil guards are suddenly attacked by an unseen assailant.

scenes.heading: INT. VISITORS QUARTERS - CAVE SYSTEM
scenes.summary: Nakia infiltrates the cave and holds the guards at gunpoint, but when one guard threatens Riri and the other reaches for a weapon, Nakia shoots both guards to save Shuri and Riri.
scenes.turningPointNote: Nakia killing the Talocanil guards breaks Namor's trust and triggers his declaration of war

scenes.heading: EXT. CAVE SYSTEM - OCEAN WATERS - DAY - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Shuri, Riri, and Nakia escape the underwater cave system wearing rebreathers and swim toward the open sea.

scenes.heading: EXT. OPEN OCEAN - DAY
scenes.summary: Nakia's skirmisher surfaces with Shuri and Riri, then the Royal Talon Fighter decloaks and beams them aboard.

scenes.heading: I/E. ROYAL TALON FIGHTER - DAY
scenes.summary: Ramonda and Shuri reunite with an embrace aboard the Royal Talon Fighter as Nakia agrees to return to Wakanda with them.

scenes.heading: INT. VISITOR’S QUARTERS - CAVE SYSTEM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Namor and Namora arrive with food to find Shuri and Riri missing and discover a dying Talocanil guard who tells them the Wakandans came for the prisoners.

scenes.heading: I/E. ROYAL TALON FIGHTER - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri briefs Ramonda and Nakia about Talocan's vast underwater civilization and Riri explains how they hack fiber optic cables, while Ramonda reveals Okoye is no longer general.

scenes.heading: EXT. NAMOR’S TEMPLE - TALOCAN - NIGHT - LATER
scenes.summary: Namor addresses his people from his throne, declaring that despite feeling betrayed by the surface world's violation of their security, Talocan will not abandon their city but will bring war to the surface.
scenes.turningPointNote: Namor's formal declaration of war against the surface world escalates the conflict to its climactic phase

scenes.heading: EXT. NORTH TRIANGLE - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye in civilian clothes shops for flowers when the vendor calls her general, and she learns Kingsguard have been patrolling since news of the princess's situation.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI’S LAB - WAKANDAN DESIGN GROUP - DAY
scenes.summary: A lab tech confirms Shuri is healthy after her captivity, then Aneka returns her energy daggers but Shuri tells her to keep them as she begins working on weaponizing dehydration.

scenes.heading: EXT. WAKANDAN RIVER BARRIER - DAY
scenes.summary: River Tribe naval soldiers guarding a bridge notice a Talocanil siren approaching their sonic barrier position.

scenes.heading: INT. TRIBAL COUNCIL ROOM - ROYAL PALACE - DAY
scenes.summary: Ramonda assures Riri that she'll be cleared of involvement in Boston and can return home safely, while Wakandans watch over Riri's mother for protection.

scenes.heading: EXT. ELEVATED WALKWAY - LITTLE RIVER TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: M'Baku and Jabari warriors observe celebrations in the city as a fisherman reports that Nakia rescued the princess, prompting M'Baku's sardonic comment about royal gratitude.

scenes.heading: EXT. OPEN AIR MARKET - RIVERBANK - LITTLE RIVER TOWN - DAY
scenes.summary: Water levels suddenly rise at the riverside market, causing boats to sway and water to lap over the banks, surprising merchants and patrons.

scenes.heading: EXT. BASHENGA’S COURTYARD - NORTH TRIANGLE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Nakia tells Okoye she shot both Talocanil guards during the rescue, while Okoye reflects on her failures and admits she was trying to care for everyone after T'Challa's death.

scenes.heading: EXT. NORTH TRIANGLE - GOLDEN CITY - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Okoye and Nakia emerge from the courtyard to find a foot of flowing water as panicked civilians flee to higher ground, realizing they're under attack.

scenes.heading: INT. TRIBAL COUNCIL ROOM - ROYAL PALACE - DAY
scenes.summary: The River Tribe Elder reports lost contact with the river blockade and citywide flooding to Ramonda, who immediately orders emergency evacuation and military response.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI'S LAB - WAKANDAN DESIGN GROUP
scenes.summary: Shuri defies Ramonda's order to stand down by pretending the communication is breaking up and hanging up, then tells Aneka they're going to provide air support.

scenes.heading: EXT. MT. BASHENGA - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Shuri's Sunbird aircraft rises from Mt. Bashenga and flies toward the Golden City.

scenes.heading: EXT. NORTH TRIANGLE - GOLDEN CITY - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: A hydrobomb explodes and blows out the side of a building, sending water geysering into the street as Okoye directs evacuation efforts.

scenes.heading: I/E. WAKANDAN HOUSE - NORTH TRIANGLE - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Nakia rescues a Wakandan man trapped under debris in a rapidly flooding house.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVER - LITTLE RIVER TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: A large wave capsizes riverboats and crashes against a bridge, sending water splashing onto the riverbank.

scenes.heading: EXT. ELEVATED WALKWAY - LITTLE RIVER TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: M'Baku sees the destruction and dives from an elevated walkway into the river water below to help.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVER WATER - LITTLE RIVER TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: M'Baku surfaces in the river water and grabs a Wakandan civilian to rescue them.

scenes.heading: EXT. LANDING PAD - ROYAL PALACE - GOLDEN CITY – DAY
scenes.summary: Wakandan EMTs load into a row of parked Scarab Beetle aircraft on the palace landing pad.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOAT WATER - ROYAL PALACE - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: Mesoamerican sirens surface in the palace moat and begin singing while playing ocarinas.

scenes.heading: EXT. LANDING PAD - ROYAL PALACE - GOLDEN CITY – DAY
scenes.summary: The siren song entrances the EMTs, causing them to walk slack-faced to the edge and jump into the moat.

scenes.heading: INT. TRIBAL COUNCIL ROOM - ROYAL PALACE - DAY
scenes.summary: Ramonda witnesses the EMTs' fate and takes remote control of the emergency response fleet, with Riri joining to help pilot the Scarab Beetles.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVER WATER - LITTLE RIVER TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: M'Baku helps a civilian to safety then spots Talocanil warriors with hydrobombs riding an orca underwater, pursuing one of them as they peel off.

scenes.heading: EXT. NORTH TRIANGLE - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye evacuates civilians when two more hydrobombs explode, then races to save a Wakandan child from a rushing deluge of water.

scenes.heading: I/E. WAKANDAN HOUSE - NORTH TRIANGLE - DAY
scenes.summary: The double explosion causes water to torrent through a window, washing Nakia and the rescued man back inside before they head upstairs.

scenes.heading: INT. TRIBAL COUNCIL ROOM - ROYAL PALACE - DAY
scenes.summary: Ramonda continues remote piloting scarab beetles with Riri's assistance while ordering Ayo to scramble air support.

scenes.heading: EXT. LANDING PAD - ROYAL PALACE - THE GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: Ayo and the Dora scramble to aircraft while she throws a sonic grenade at the sirens in the moat, then takes off in her Talon Fighter.

scenes.heading: EXT. OKOYE’S HOME - NORTH TRIANGLE - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye helps the Wakandan child climb onto her roof for safety.

scenes.heading: EXT. OKOYE’S ROOF - NORTH TRIANGLE - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Nakia signals from a nearby roof with the rescued man while Okoye surveys the devastation and spots Attuma standing atop Bashenga's Courtyard entrance.

scenes.heading: EXT. OKOYE’S ROOF - NORTH TRIANGLE - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: A Scarab Beetle uses Kimoyo Beads to levitate Nakia, the Wakandan man, the child, and Okoye up to the rescue craft.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVER WATER - LITTLE RIVER TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: M'Baku climbs onto a catamaran and strikes a Talocanil warrior with his weapon, knocking him into the river, but the warrior's hydrobomb lands in the boat.

scenes.heading: INT. UNDERWATER - LITTLE RIVER TOWN - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: M'Baku throws the hydrobomb overboard where it sinks underwater and explodes.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVERBANK - LITTLE RIVER TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: The massive underwater explosion propels M'Baku's boat toward the palace and causes a catastrophic rise in water levels.

scenes.heading: EXT. STEP TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: A bus is swept away in the flood water.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - STEP TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Two Dragon Fighters lift the bus safely into the air using cables.

scenes.heading: INT. TRIBAL COUNCIL ROOM - ROYAL PALACE - DAY
scenes.summary: Ramonda continues orchestrating the remote piloting of scarab beetles while Riri takes on evacuation duties in the North Triangle.

scenes.heading: EXT. LITTLE RIVER TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: Namor appears barefoot and shirtless among panicked civilians at a craft stand, taking a souvenir before heading toward the palace with Namora confirming their defenses are diverted.
scenes.turningPointNote: Namor personally enters the battle zone, targeting the palace directly while defenses are distracted

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: Talon Fighters begin raining sonic fire down on Talocanil warriors from above.

scenes.heading: EXT. LITTLE RIVER TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: M'Baku charges at Namor with his weapon but Namor blocks the attack, splintering M'Baku's wooden weapon and sending him flying back a city block with a single punch.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - GOLDEN CITY - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Namor flies to a Dragonflyer aircraft and effortlessly cuts off its tail, causing it to crash while two more Dragonflyers approach to face him.

scenes.heading: I/E. AYO’S TALON FIGHTER - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ayo and Nomble spot Namor from their Talon Fighter and take aim at him.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - GOLDEN CITY - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Namor evades the sonic rounds fired at him from the Talon Fighter.

scenes.heading: I/E. AYO’S TALON FIGHTER - SKY - GOLDEN CITY - DAY -
scenes.summary: Ayo reports that Namor is too quick to track, then Namor grabs both Talon Fighters and hurls them down, crashing them into buildings.

scenes.heading: EXT. ELEVATED WALKWAY - GOLDEN CITY - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Namor lands on an elevated walkway as Shuri's Sunbird aircraft appears behind him.

scenes.heading: I/E. SHURI’S SUNBIRD - GOLDEN CITY - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Shuri and Aneka fire sonic blasts at Namor, who runs and dives into the moat, while they also gun down another Talocanil warrior.

scenes.heading: I/E. MOAT WATER - ROYAL PALACE - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: Namor swims in circles underwater while Shuri and Aneka struggle to target him, then suddenly darts up and drives his spear through the Sunbird's cockpit windshield.

scenes.heading: I/E. SHURI’S SUNBIRD - GOLDEN CITY - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Shuri and Aneka lose control of their aircraft as it malfunctions and crashes into the moat, with the cockpit filling with water.

scenes.heading: I/E. OKOYE’S SCARAB BEETLE - SKY - DAY
scenes.summary: Nakia and Okoye watch from their aircraft as Shuri's Sunbird goes down, with Okoye's kimoyo beads activating.

scenes.heading: INT. TRIBAL COUNCIL ROOM - ROYAL PALACE - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ramonda stands at the window in shock with Riri beside her, then contacts Okoye about Shuri's downed aircraft.

scenes.heading: I/E. OKOYE’S SCARAB BEETLE - SKY - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye confirms she can reach Shuri and takes control of their aircraft, piloting toward the moat.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: Namor flies to the Tribal Council windows and stares at Ramonda and Riri through the glass.

scenes.heading: INT. TRIBAL COUNCIL ROOM - ROYAL PALACE - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ramonda remotely pilots scarab beetles to safety while spotting Namor approaching through the glass, then pulls Riri behind her to block his view.

scenes.heading: EXT. LITTLE RIVER TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: M'Baku pulls Ayo and Nomble from the Talon Fighter wreckage while spotting Namora's abandoned hydrobomb.

scenes.heading: I/E. OKOYE’S SCARAB BEETLE - MOAT - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri and Aneka are levitated up to Okoye's aircraft by their kimoyo beads, then all watch Namor flying in front of the Tribal Council windows.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - GOLDEN CITY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Namor cocks his spear and brings it down onto the Tribal Council windows, causing them to spidercrack but hold.

scenes.heading: INT. TRIBAL COUNCIL ROOM - ROYAL PALACE - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ramonda eyes Namor confidently as she continues piloting the beetles, with Griot announcing one minute until the last scarab beetle reaches safety.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - GOLDEN CITY - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Namor smiles at Ramonda through the window, then drops below out of sight.

scenes.heading: INT. TRIBAL COUNCIL ROOM - ROYAL PALACE - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ramonda and Riri look out to see where Namor has gone, then Ramonda tells Riri to run while Riri protests leaving her behind.

scenes.heading: EXT. LANDING PAD - ROYAL PALACE - THE GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: Namor calls out to Namora in Maya, then dives off the landing pad into the moat below where Namora waits with hydrobombs.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - GOLDEN CITY - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Namor emerges from the water holding three hydrobombs in his right hand and his spear in his left, shouting "Imperious Rex" in Maya.

scenes.heading: EXT. LITTLE RIVER TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: M'Baku, Ayo and Nomble watch Namor from Little River Town.

scenes.heading: I/E. OKOYE’S SCARAB BEETLE - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri, Okoye, Nakia, Aneka and the civilians all look up at Namor from their aircraft.

scenes.heading: INT. TRIBAL COUNCIL ROOM - ROYAL PALACE - DAY
scenes.summary: Ramonda sees on her holographic map that all the scarab beetles have safely arrived.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - GOLDEN CITY - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Namor hurls the hydrobombs at the Tribal Council windows, which decompress into water just before impact.

scenes.heading: INT. TRIBAL COUNCIL - ROYAL PALACE - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Water crashes through the glass, rapidly flooding the room and breaking through the glass floor, sending Ramonda and Riri down in a rush of water, glass and furniture.
scenes.turningPointNote: Namor's attack succeeds in flooding the Tribal Council room, putting Ramonda and Riri in mortal danger

scenes.heading: I/E. OKOYE’S SCARAB BEETLE - NORTH TRIANGLE - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri, Okoye, Nakia and Aneka witness the explosion in horror as Okoye races their aircraft toward the landing pad.

scenes.heading: EXT. LITTLE RIVER TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: M'Baku, Ayo and Nomble see the explosion and sprint toward the palace, staggered by what they witnessed.

scenes.heading: INT. FLOODED LOWER LEVEL - TRIBAL COUNTIL ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Ramonda regains consciousness underwater, sees Riri floating lifelessly, grabs her and begins swimming toward the surface.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: Namor surveys the destroyed Tribal Council room and collapsing palace sections, confident that Riri and Ramonda are dead, then joins his warriors and dives back into the water victorious.

scenes.heading: EXT. LANDING PAD - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye lands their aircraft and she, Shuri, Nakia and Aneka run inside the Tribal Council Room.

scenes.heading: INT. FLOODED TRIBAL COUNCIL ROOM - ROYAL PALACE - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye and Nakia find Riri on the platform and Ramonda floating face-down in the water, then attempt resuscitation while Aneka holds back a struggling Shuri who calls for her mother.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ramonda is found floating face-down, apparently dead, while Shuri desperately tries to reach her

scenes.heading: EXT. GOLDEN CITY - WAKANDA - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nightfall settles over the flooded Golden City.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVERBANK - WAKANDAN BUSH - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Shuri walks toward a river holding a large weight while aiming her gauntlet at Okoye's head, telling Nakia and Okoye to leave her alone as she expresses that everyone she loves is gone and she has nothing left.

scenes.heading: EXT. SACRED GROVE - WAKANDA - DAY
scenes.summary: Nakia, Shuri, Okoye and others attend Ramonda's funeral as Sope the Shaman pours libations and recites Ramonda's lineage in Xhosa.

scenes.heading: EXT. SACRED GROVE - WAKANDA - LATER
scenes.summary: M'Baku offers comfort to Shuri and reveals he promised T'Challa to provide her counsel and protection, then discusses the tribal elders' proposition to evacuate to Jabariland.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVER WATER - LITTLE RIVER TOWN - GOLDEN CITY - DAYS
scenes.summary: Wakandan technicians examine the wreckage and find Namora's abandoned hydrobomb, with the WDG scientist deciding to take it to the princess despite safety concerns.

scenes.heading: EXT. JABARILAND - DAY - DAYS LATER
scenes.summary: Wakandan habitat structures are set up in Jabariland as scarab beetles arrive with Golden City refugees, with Ayo, M'Bele and Nakia watching families settle in.

scenes.heading: INT. CAPITAL BUILDING - JABARILAND - LATER
scenes.summary: Wakandan Tribal Elders and Zawavari meet to discuss selecting a new ruler, debating the safety of performing the ritual at Warrior Falls given the security breach.

scenes.heading: EXT. GRASSLAND - WAKANDAN BORDER REGION - DAY
scenes.summary: The Border Tribe Elder asks Okoye to step forward as a candidate for Queen on behalf of the Border Tribe, revealing it would have been her destiny had she not joined the Dora Milaje.

scenes.heading: EXT. GEORGE BUSH CENTER OF INTELLIGENCE - DAY
scenes.summary: Ross stands outside CIA headquarters and uses his hidden kimoyo beads to contact Wakanda.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI’S LAB - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri tells Ross that Queen Ramonda is dead and asks him to keep the US at bay, warning that Wakanda cannot handle another enemy.

scenes.heading: INT. CIA OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Ross and Val meet with US officials who propose going on the offensive against Wakanda through destabilization rather than sanctions.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI'S LAB - WAKANDAN DESIGN GROUP - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri examines Namora's hydrobomb while talking with Riri about the science behind it and the need to learn about Talocan, with Riri expressing discomfort about the situation.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI’S LAB - WAKANDAN DESIGN GROUP - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Shuri enters her lab holding Namor's mother's bracelet and instructs Griot to run a comparative analysis between the Heart-Shaped Herb and the bracelet fibers, also uploading her brother's DNA.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI’S LAB - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Okoye expresses reluctance about fighting in an unconventional way as a civilian, while Shuri shows her the completed Midnight Angels suit and asks her to be ready when called.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI’S LAB - WAKANDAN DESIGN GROUP - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri discovers her DNA helix is complete and green with 98.7% confidence, hesitating at the bioprinter when Nakia arrives and questions her about the synthetic Heart-Shaped Herb.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI’S LAB - WAKANDAN DESIGN GROUP - DAY - LATER
scenes.summary: Nakia prepares a Heart-Shaped Herb concoction while Shuri lies on an examination table, then pours the liquid into Shuri's mouth as her veins begin to glow purple.

scenes.heading: INT. FLOODED LOWER LEVEL - ANCESTRAL PLANE - TIMELESS
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: INT. TRIBAL COUNCIL ROOM - ANCESTRAL PLANE - TIMELESS
scenes.summary: Shuri emerges from water in the ancestral plane expecting to see her mother, but finds Killmonger on the throne instead, who tells her she chose him and challenges her claim that she took the herb to see family.
scenes.turningPointNote: Shuri encounters Killmonger instead of her family in the ancestral plane, revealing her true motivations

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI’S LAB - WAKANDAN DESIGN GROUP - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri awakens from the herb vision yelling in terror, tells Nakia that none of her family came to her and claims the ancestors abandoned her when asked who she saw.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI’S LAB
scenes.summary: Shuri puts on a gold necklace that activates vibranium nanites to form a new Black Panther suit, then lifts and puts on her helmet which dissolves and reforms around her head.
scenes.turningPointNote: Shuri officially becomes the new Black Panther by donning the suit

scenes.heading: EXT. CAPITAL BUILDING - JABARILAND - WAKANDA - DAY
scenes.summary: Wakandan refugees in Jabariland look up at something in the sky.

scenes.heading: INT. CAPITAL BUILDING - JABARILAND - WAKANDA
scenes.summary: The Black Panther appears perched on a Jabari totem during a meeting of tribal elders, then leaps down and reveals herself to be Shuri, prompting cheers from the elders.

scenes.heading: INT. CAPITAL BUILDING - JABARILAND - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri tells the assembled leaders that Namor believes Wakanda is weakened and they will draw the Talocanil out to prove him wrong.

scenes.heading: INT. CAPITAL BUILDING - JABARILAND - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri explains their plan to use Riri's vibranium detector to lure Namor to the surface where they can dehydrate and kill him, while the Border Tribe Elder refuses to participate and M'Baku questions what happens after they kill Namor.

scenes.heading: EXT. LANDING PAD - GOLDEN CITY - DAY
scenes.summary: Wakandan forces including Shuri in her Black Panther suit prepare to board the Royal Sea Leopard while M'Baku asks Riri if she's ready for battle and Nakia pulls Shuri aside to question her motives.

scenes.heading: EXT. ANEKA’S HOUSE - RIVER PROVINCE - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye approaches a traditional stilt house in the evacuated River Province where Aneka lives.

scenes.heading: INT. ANEKA’S HOUSE - RIVER PROVINCE - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye finds Aneka cleaning flood damage and they discuss why Aneka left the Dora, with Aneka explaining she couldn't bear fighting other Dora and reassuring Okoye that she served Wakanda well.

scenes.heading: INT. NAMOR'S TEMPLE - TALOCAN - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Attuma and Namora inform Namor that another vibranium detector is active in the ocean, and despite suspecting a trap, Namor orders them to gather warriors to attack whoever is using it.

scenes.heading: INT. DEEP OCEAN - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Namor, Attuma and Namora are hit by a concussive sonic force while approaching the vibranium detector underwater, forcing them to swim to the surface in pain.

scenes.heading: EXT. OCEAN SURFACE - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Namor and the Talocanil breach the ocean surface as the massive Royal Sea Leopard decloaks, revealing the Wakandan trap.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY - CONTINOUS
scenes.summary: Shuri orders the attack and the Royal Sea Leopard opens fire on the Talocanil while Wakandan aircraft launch their assault.

scenes.heading: EXT. OCEAN SURFACE - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Under fire, Namor orders Namora to destroy the sonic weapon and Attuma to take the ship, then takes a conch shell and flies into the sky.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Namor flies into the sky, blows the conch shell and flings it away, then attacks Wakandan aircraft, causing one to crash into the Royal Sea Leopard's deck.

scenes.heading: EXT. OCEAN SURFACE - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Attuma leads Talocanil warriors climbing up the sides of the Royal Sea Leopard while others throw hydrobombs at Wakandan aircraft.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Nakia and M'Baku move to defend one side of the ship while the Dora prepare to jump off with cable harnesses, followed by Shuri who engages her mask and leaps unharnessed.

scenes.heading: EXT. SIDE DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri and the Dora scale down the ship's side battling Talocanil warriors in coordinated combat moves.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: M'Baku spots a lone Talocanil warrior climbing up and knocks him off the deck with his knobkerrie before the warrior can fully board.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Namor downs another Wakandan aircraft, then grabs an unmanned dragonflyer and realizes it's a trap when he sees Riri in her Ironheart suit approaching from above.

scenes.heading: INT. RIRI’S HUD - DAY
scenes.summary: Riri in her Ironheart suit focuses on Namor and taunts him before engaging in combat.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Riri fires heat-seeking rounds at Namor from her suit's weapons, but he dodges and leads her on a chase.

scenes.heading: EXT. SIDE DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri watches from the ship's side as Riri and the Royal Talon Fighter pursue Namor in the distance.

scenes.heading: EXT. DEEP OCEAN - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Namora and five warriors endure excruciating pain from the sonic emitter as they force themselves toward it underwater, with Namora's ears bleeding as she repeatedly strikes it with her spear, creating a small fissure.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Riri battles Namor in the sky with repulsor blasts, matching his movements before unleashing a massive assault that sends him crashing into the Royal Talon Fighter, where Shuri jumps aboard and enters the cockpit.
scenes.turningPointNote: Namor is successfully captured and trapped in the Royal Talon Fighter with Shuri

scenes.heading: EXT. SIDE DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Attuma watches the aircraft fly away with Namor aboard and shouts in distress.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Riri lands next to M'Baku celebrating their capture of Namor while M'Baku orders retreat to Wakanda and Nakia announces the successful capture over comms.

scenes.heading: INT. OCEAN - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: The Royal Sea Leopard's thrusters fire up and the ship begins moving forward.

scenes.heading: EXT. SIDE DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: The Dora are pulled back up to the deck while Talocanil warriors continue pursuing the departing ship.

scenes.heading: INT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: The Royal Sea Leopard takes off while Riri launches back into the air.

scenes.heading: I/E. ROYAL TALON FIGHTER - SKY - DAY
scenes.summary: Namor finds himself sealed in darkness in the Royal Talon Fighter, then faces Shuri behind a sonic partition as she declares herself the Black Panther seeking retribution, while heat-dehumidifier panels gradually intensify and they argue about the queen's actions and the murdered child.

scenes.heading: INT. OKOYE'S HUD - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye hears Shuri's voice over comms calling for advance.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Wakandans on the Royal Sea Leopard fire projectiles at Talocanil warriors still clinging to the ship's sides.

scenes.heading: EXT. UNDERWATER - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Namora battles through the sonic emitter's torturous effects underwater, continuing when other soldiers give up, until she creates a fissure and places a hydrobomb inside that explodes and destroys the device.
scenes.turningPointNote: The sonic emitter is destroyed, removing Wakanda's key advantage

scenes.heading: EXT. SIDE DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Attuma and the Talocanil warriors notice the sonic emitter has stopped, prompting Attuma to smile and jump off the ship with the other warriors.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: A naval engineer informs M'Baku that the sonic emitter has been destroyed, while Nakia confirms they're at maximum speed.

scenes.heading: EXT. UNDERWATER - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Attuma, Namora and the Talocanil pursue the ship underwater when a massive whale cry rings out, causing Namora and Attuma to smile as Attuma declares the ship is now theirs.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD
scenes.summary: The Wakandans hear whale cries and watch as the Talocanil warriors smile and dive back into the ocean, prompting M'Baku to observe that this can't be good.

scenes.heading: INT. OCEAN - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Two blue whales covered in Talocanil warriors and carrying massive clusters of hydrobombs swim under the Royal Sea Leopard's propulsion system and detonate the explosives.
scenes.turningPointNote: The Royal Sea Leopard is critically damaged by the whale-delivered hydrobomb attack

scenes.heading: EXT. OCEAN - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: The Royal Sea Leopard's rear explodes out of the water and crashes back down, causing the ship to list vertically in violent rough seas.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: With the ship listing and waters teeming with Talocanil warriors, Wakandans fall into the ocean while others hold on, as the Dora link weapons to secure each other.

scenes.heading: INT. OCEAN - BENEATH LISTED RSL - DAY
scenes.summary: Naval officers and Kingsguard who fall into the water are immediately attacked and killed by Attuma, Namora and their forces.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: M'Baku tells Nakia they must get the ship upright or everyone will die as they both hold onto the listing vessel.

scenes.heading: INT. ROYAL TALON FIGHTER - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri sees the Royal Sea Leopard's distress on her display and hears panicked Wakandan voices over comms, while Namor threatens to drown all of Wakanda unless she turns around, but realizes he's been weakened by the dehydration panels.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Riri sees Wakandan soldiers falling into the water, dives down to rescue a Dora warrior, and flies her up to safety.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: INT. OCEAN - BENEATH LISTED RSL - DAY
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: INT. NAKIA'S HUD - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: A Wakandan Naval Engineer checks his kimoyo bead and confirms the approaching vessels are Wakandan, then asks them to identify themselves.

scenes.heading: INT. OKOYE’S HUD - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye smiles and identifies herself over radio as Okoye Daughter of Korabo.

scenes.heading: INT. ANEKA’S HUD - DAY
scenes.summary: Aneka identifies herself over radio as Aneka Daughter of Kyana.

scenes.heading: INT. OKOYE'S HUD - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye announces that the Midnight Angels will rebalance the ship.

scenes.heading: EXT. OCEAN SURFACE - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye and Aneka in their Midnight Angel suits fly through the air toward the listed Royal Sea Leopard and dive underwater.

scenes.heading: I/E. ROYAL TALON FIGHTER - SKY - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri and Namor fight inside the Royal Talon Fighter, their battle drives Namor's spear deeper into the thruster which suddenly explodes.

scenes.heading: EXT. ATACAMA DESERT - CHILE - DAY
scenes.summary: The RTF violently crashes in the Atacama Desert, both Namor and Shuri climb out of the flaming wreckage and continue their furious fight in the sand.

scenes.heading: INT. PUMP ROOM - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye and Aneka in their Midnight Angels uniforms blast into the pump room and begin lifting pistons using their enhanced strength.

scenes.heading: EXT. ATACAMA DESERT - CHILE - DAY
scenes.summary: Namor brutally pummels Shuri against a boulder until her suit's energy maxes out from absorbing his massive punches and explodes.

scenes.heading: EXT. OCEAN SURFACE - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Water geysers from ports along the massive vessel as it tilts itself upright again.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Wakandans and Talocanil scramble on the deck as Riri strafes past blasting Talocanil while Attuma deflects her blasts with his shield.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye and Aneka land on deck and join a frenetic battle against growing torrents of Talocanil pouring over the sides, with Ayo directing attacks on their breathing devices.

scenes.heading: EXT. ATACAMA DESERT - CHILE - DAY
scenes.summary: Weakened Namor struggles to his feet, removing a spear tip from his shoulder, his wings damaged and no longer invulnerable as Shuri steps atop boulder rubble galvanized.

scenes.heading: EXT. OCEAN SURFACE - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Riri gives air cover while Nakia races toward a drowning officer, but Namora approaches to strike Nakia until Riri plunges into the ocean tackling her.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - ATLANTIC - DAY
scenes.summary: Riri bursts from water clutching Nakia with Namora clinging to her back, then unleashes a unibeam launching Namora through the air into the ocean.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: The Wakandans continue fighting on deck until Ayo receives an alert that the RTF has gone down, prompting Okoye to free the Sunbird to fly off.

scenes.heading: EXT. ATACAMA DESERT - CHILE - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri brutally thrashes the weakened Namor until he desperately grabs a Wakandan spear and impales her through her armored torso, pinning her to a boulder.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Okoye faces off against Attuma in single combat after he speaks to her in Maya and prepares for their lifelong warrior confrontation.

scenes.heading: EXT. ATACAMA DESERT - CHILE - DAY
scenes.summary: Namor walks toward the ocean leaving Shuri impaled, but she sees Ramonda's spirit, breaks the spear handle, painfully frees herself and pursues him.

scenes.heading: EXT. ATACAMA DESERT - CHILE - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri sees the brittle, exhausted Namor trudging toward water and hurriedly activates her kimoyo beads to interface with the RTF debris thrusters.
scenes.turningPointNote: Shuri gains the upper hand by weaponizing the crash debris against Namor

scenes.heading: EXT. ATACAMA DESERT - CHILE - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri positions herself between Namor and water, activates the thrusters engulfing them both in flames, then holds a spear to the barely alive Namor's throat.
scenes.turningPointNote: The climactic moment where Shuri defeats Namor and holds his life in her hands

scenes.heading: EXT. DECK - ROYAL SEA LEOPARD - DAY
scenes.summary: The overwhelmed Wakandans battle in their last stand against an immense army of Talocanil surrounding the vessel as M'Baku hopes the Princess hurries.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKY - ATLANTIC - DAY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The Sunbird approaches with Shuri and Namor standing side by side as Namor orders the Talocanil to stand down and the Wakandans cheer for the Black Panther.
scenes.turningPointNote: The war ends with Shuri and Namor appearing together, showing their alliance

scenes.heading: INT. FRONT HALLWAY - ROSS’ VIRGINIA HOME - DAY
scenes.summary: Ross walks downstairs in his Virginia home having just woken up and hears something offscreen.

scenes.heading: INT. KITCHEN - ROSS’ VIRGINIA HOUSE - DAY
scenes.summary: Ross finds Val in his kitchen making herself a salad and commenting on his expired olive oil.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - ROSS’ VIRGINIA HOME - DAY
scenes.summary: Val shows Ross news footage blaming Wakanda for the mining vessel attack and interrogates him about his connections to Wakanda, revealing she had the kimoyo beads analyzed.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROSS' HOUSE - VIRGINIA - DAY - A MOMENT LATER
scenes.summary: Ross is put in handcuffs and placed in the back of a sedan by federal agents as Val watches.

scenes.heading: EXT. ONE LANE RD - DAY
scenes.summary: A prison transport van motors along a tree-lined road.

scenes.heading: INT. PRISON TRANSPORT VAN - DAY
scenes.summary: Ross rides in the transport van when the officer hits the brakes as they encounter a large tree blocking the road and the engine cuts off.

scenes.heading: EXT. ONE LANE RD - DAY
scenes.summary: The transport officers get out to investigate the blocked road, drawing their weapons and making radio calls.

scenes.heading: INT. PRISON TRANSPORT VAN - DAY
scenes.summary: Ross hears shouting and gunfire as both officers are violently slammed against the van, then Okoye appears as a Midnight Angel and rips off the back doors to free him.

scenes.heading: EXT. NAMOR'S MEMOROBILIA ROOM - CAVE SYSTEM - DAY
scenes.summary: Namora enters the cave system and walks toward Namor's hut where she can hear him humming.

scenes.heading: INT. NAMOR’S MEMOROBILIA ROOM - CAVE SYSTEM - DAY
scenes.summary: Namora finds Namor painting a visual interpretation of the battle between Wakanda and Talocan, and he explains why Shuri spared his life and how this gives Talocan protection.

scenes.heading: INT. ANEKA’S APARTMENT - RIVER PROVINCE - DAY
scenes.summary: Ayo arrives at Aneka's house party to offer her restoration as a Dora on behalf of the Elders, which Aneka accepts before they kiss.

scenes.heading: EXT. SACRED GROVE - WAKANDA - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri plants new heart-shaped herb in the Sacred Grove while WDG scientists scatter throughout planting more as the Shaman looks on.

scenes.heading: INT. SHURI’S LAB - WAKANDAN DESIGN GROUP - DAY - LATER
scenes.summary: Shuri tells Riri she can't take her suit home but shows her a new, improved suit design as a gift before Riri departs for America.

scenes.heading: EXT. WARRIOR FALLS - WAKANDA - DAY
scenes.summary: At Warrior Falls, the tribal elders wait for the Black Panther but M'Baku emerges from the Royal Talon Fighter instead, announcing she sends her regards but will not be joining them.
scenes.turningPointNote: Shuri's absence from the ceremony shows her rejection of traditional royal duties

scenes.heading: EXT. HAITIAN STREET - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri walks down a Haitian street and tells Okoye she doesn't need protection anymore, but Okoye reveals she came to say goodbye.

scenes.heading: EXT. NAKIA’S HAITIAN VILLA - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri arrives at Nakia's Haitian villa where they embrace and Nakia leads her toward a fire.

scenes.heading: EXT. HAITIAN BEACH - DAY
scenes.summary: Shuri sits alone by a beach fire, throws her white grieving garments into the flames, watches them burn, then becomes emotional looking out at the ocean.
scenes.turningPointNote: Shuri completes her grieving ritual by burning her mourning clothes

scenes.heading: EXT. COURTYARD - HAITIAN SCHOOL - DAY - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Ramonda and Nakia watch a boy dominating on a soccer pitch, and when he runs over, Ramonda tenderly touches his face with tears in her eyes.

scenes.heading: EXT. HAITIAN BEACH - SUNSET
scenes.summary: Nakia's son reveals his secret Wakandan name is Prince T'Challa, son of King T'Challa, causing Shuri to well up with tearful joy as she envisions her brother smiling at her.
scenes.turningPointNote: The revelation of T'Challa's son provides hope and continuity for the royal bloodline
